falsification_risks.name: Species confound
falsification_risks.text: 3-species design cannot separate species effect from heart-rate effect. Turquoise correlates with both species (r=-0.96) and high_heart_rate (r=-0.955) - these are nearly collinear.

falsification_risks.name: Unsigned network artifact
falsification_risks.text: Unsigned network merges up/down genes. A shared module could be an artifact of genes going in opposite directions. Signed network analysis would resolve this.

falsification_risks.name: Forced power=4
falsification_risks.text: Auto-pick was 1. Forcing 4 may create artificial structure. Sensitivity analysis at power=6,8 would check robustness.

falsification_risks.name: Atrium sample size
falsification_risks.text: n=23 atrium samples (7 Sk atrial). Module stability at n=7/group questionable. Atrium modules are exploratory only.

falsification_risks.name: Permutation count
falsification_risks.text: nPermutations=50 for preservation. Should be >=100 (preferably 200+) for publication-grade Z-summary.

survives: turquoise: high-rate anti-correlation (r=-0.955) + strong preservation (Z=16.9) + DEG overlap
brown: high-rate correlation (r=+0.80) + moderate preservation (Z=4.5) + DEG overlap

falsification_risks.name: 物种 vs 心率混淆
falsification_risks.text: 三物种设计中物种与心率完全混淆，无法分离趋同信号与物种特异性信号。需第四物种解决。

falsification_risks.name: 无符号网络假象
falsification_risks.text: turquoise 模块可能合并了上调和下调基因。signed network 可验证。

falsification_risks.name: 心房样本量不足
falsification_risks.text: Sk 心房仅 7 样本，心房模块稳定性无法保证。

falsification_risks.name: 保存性排列次数不足
falsification_risks.text: 50 次排列，p 值不稳定。提至 200+ 可解决。

survives: turquoise 趋同信号（保存性 Z=16.9 极强）
falsified: H1（心房趋同）：心房样本量不足以确信模块稳定性
